commands.name: codegen
commands.description:
generate Db.fs and query helpers from Schema.fs plus
compiled schema types

options.name: --dir
options.description:
directory that contains Schema.fs and generated
source files (default: current directory)

options.name: --assembly
options.description: generated Db.fs code

options.name: --schema-module
options.description:
compiled schema module name when using --assembly
(default: Schema)

options.name: --module
options.description: module name for generated F# code (default: Db)

options.name: --output
options.description:
output file name in the schema directory (default:
Db.fs)

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: cutover
commands.description:
mark new database as ready for serving
archive-old <options> archive the old database after cutover

options.name: --dir
options.description:
directory that contains Schema.fs and
<dir>-<hash>.sqlite files (default: current directory)

options.name: --assembly
options.description: module

options.name: --module
options.description:
compiled module name when using --assembly (default:
Db)

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: drain
commands.description:
stop writes on old database and replay accumulated
changes

options.name: --dir
options.description:
directory that contains Schema.fs and
<dir>-<hash>.sqlite files (default: current directory)

options.name: --assembly
options.description: module

options.name: --module
options.description:
compiled module name when using --assembly (default:
Db)

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: init
commands.description:
initialize a schema-matched database from a compiled
generated module

options.name: --dir
options.description:
directory that contains the target sqlite location
for the generated Db module (default: current
directory)

options.name: --assembly
options.description: module

options.name: --module
options.description:
compiled module name when using --assembly (default:
Db)

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: migrate
commands.description:
create new database and copy data from old using a
compiled generated module

options.name: --dir
options.description:
directory that contains existing sqlite files for the
migration (default: current directory)

options.name: --assembly
options.description: module

options.name: --module
options.description:
compiled module name when using --assembly (default:
Db)

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: offline
commands.description:
run a one-shot offline migration using a compiled
generated module

options.name: --dir
options.description:
directory that contains existing sqlite files for the
migration (default: current directory)

options.name: --assembly
options.description: module

options.name: --module
options.description:
compiled module name when using --assembly (default:
Db)

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: plan
commands.description:
show a dry-run migration plan using a compiled
generated module

options.name: --dir
options.description:
directory that contains existing sqlite files for the
migration (default: current directory)

options.name: --assembly
options.description: module

options.name: --module
options.description:
compiled module name when using --assembly (default:
Db)

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

commands.name: reset
commands.description: reset failed migration artifacts on old/new databases

options.name: --dir
options.description:
directory that contains Schema.fs and
<dir>-<hash>.sqlite files (default: current directory)

options.name: --assembly
options.description: module

options.name: --module
options.description:
compiled module name when using --assembly (default:
Db)

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
print reset impact without dropping old migration
tables or deleting the new database

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --dir
options.description:
directory that contains Schema.fs and
<dir>-<hash>.sqlite files (default: current directory)

options.name: --assembly
options.description: module

options.name: --module
options.description:
compiled module name when using --assembly (default:
Db)

options.name: --help
options.description: display this list of options.

options.name: --version
options.description: print mig version
